lines.speaker: Kai
lines.text: Hi there, my name is Kai and I'm the keeper of this here ent habitat.

lines.speaker: Kai
lines.text: Good question! Ents are ancient beings that resemble trees, we believe they draw their energy directly from nature.

lines.speaker: Kai
lines.text: Another good question! We're not sure exactly, we just know they're a very old race.

lines.speaker: Kai
lines.text: I have heard of similar creatures roaming a desolate part of the eastern continent, though.

lines.speaker: Kai
lines.text: Of course! There's no shortage of them residing within the dungeon, and they're a fantastic source of wood.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the information, see you around.
